name: Arshauni
startIntroPart1: Queen Catherine of the Crims Dynasty. Born during the turbulent Conquest era of the world, you took the throne at an early age. Accompanied by your three brothers you reformed the governance of what was once a backward tribe into an efficient feudal monarchy, taking inspiration from the Valricans but with your own twist of centralized power and stronger authority of the crown. Oh, Catherine. Your people call for your guidance and leadership. Can you take the throne and lead your people into greatness? Can you reform your nation into a great cultural hub that will be remembered for years to come? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: This conquest will bring us glory as we turn you into history!
attacked: This transgression will not be forgotten!
defeated: No... This is not right... We were supposed to win...
introduction: You stand before the Queen of the Arshauni, I hope you are to be our friend.
neutralHello: I greet you with open arms.
hateHello: Relations can be fixed, use your words carefully.
tradeRequest: Let us exchange wealth and goods for the goodness of both of our nations.
uniques: Comment [Unique Unit is a Great General military unit that scales by the land melee unit techs alongside having a stronger effect.]

name: Redinma
startIntroPart1: Aureli Cestanus, King of Redinma. Originating from the line of the last few Valrican Emperors, your claim on the imperial throne is strong, yet contested. You stabilized the lands near the old capital and took full control of the peninsula that once was the capital of wealth in the world. Eventually, you began to march northwards to continue your attempts at reunifying the shattered nations of what was once the Valrican Empire. Oh, Aureli. The glory of the past calls to be reborn. Can you resurrect the ancient empire? Can you hold onto and control the disorganized realms of old? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: Consider this a reconquering of what should be mine!
attacked: You wield your sword like a noble, yet your actions is of a barbarian!
defeated: My empire! You will pay for what you've done!
introduction: Bow before who will soon be your emperor.
hateHello: Words can not express the humility you bring to your people.
tradeRequest: I am willing to share my prosperity with you if you are willing to accept.
uniques: [+1 Happiness] <for [9999] turns> <upon conquering a city> <hidden from users>
Comment [Capturing a city will grant you a permanent +1 Happiness that never decays.]

name: Velticia
startIntroPart1: Lorenzo Amalnoa, Podesta of the Veltician Republic. Born during the turbulent three hundred years after the fall of the Valrican Empire, you initially were a pirate leading a notorious crew which plundered the coasts of the Valrican provinces, after a major defeat which left you and many of your crew maimed, you retired in your homeland and got into politics where your cutthroat tactics and sheer gall got you the position of Podesta where your naval reforms gave Velticia a great advantage in their wars to come. Oh, Lorenzo. The smell of the seas awaken you. Can you plunder the lands of your enemies and absorb its riches? Can you lead your navy to conquer the seas and land that touches it? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: This is no trick, your time has come!
attacked: Bring some extra towels, your men are sure to take a dip!
defeated: It seems karma has finally caught up to me...
introduction: I come with open hands and lowered weapons, shall it stay that way?
hateHello: The only thing worth my time when it comes to you would be if you were to give me tribute.
tradeRequest: These goods are legitimately obtained, contrary to my usual hijinks.
uniques: [+50]% construction time for [All Road] improvements <in [Coastal] tiles>
When defeating a [{Melee} {Water}] unit, earn [0] Gold and recruit it <with [100]% chance> <hidden from users>
When defeating a [{Ranged} {Water}] unit, earn [50] Gold and recruit it <with [0]% chance> <hidden from users>
Comment [When defeating a melee water unit, recruit it. When defeating a ranged water unit, gain 50 gold.]

name: Tronixii
startIntroPart1: Rwoullan Thrye, Chieftain of the Tronixii peoples. Unlike the ancestors before you, you did not focus on the art of raiding and plundering which your nation was known for. During your reign, you made significant cultural reforms which shaped the people of Tronixii to become strong and healthy, putting an emphasis on a balance of duty to the chiefdom and personal life. Oh, Rwoullan. It seems the people once again need a cultural reform. Can you create a system where your people can prosper and enjoy their lifes? Can you create a reform which shapes the future of your nation? Can you build a civilization that will stand the test of time?
declaringWar: The time for peace has ended, we go to war!
attacked: My ancestors were right about people like you!
defeated: You are a demon! A demon who destroys all that is good! Gods curse you!
introduction: It is Rwoullan, my ancestors would've just stabbed you already.
hateHello: May the gods punish you for your audacity!
tradeRequest: I believe that this trade will help both of our peoples.
uniques: [+1 Culture] from [Coast] tiles [in all cities] <in [Coastal] tiles>
Comment [In the future when its implemented, this civ will have better cultural reformations or policy repicking.]
